archetype: 4 - Swiss & High-Contrast (Elevated for Italian Premium Finance)
design_philosophy: Premium, mature, ordered, innovative, and memorable. A serious product with identity. Not a generic SaaS template. Focus on strong typography, breathing room, and clear hierarchy.

layout_and_spacing.general: Generous spacing. p-6 to p-8 for cards. gap-6 to gap-8 for grids.
layout_and_spacing.kpi_grid: Bento-style grid. 1 hero KPI (larger, deep navy background), others smaller. Avoid uniform grids.
layout_and_spacing.background_element: Massive background typographic element reading 'HERION'. Fixed position, behind content, opacity-5 (text-slate-200/40), monumental, pyramidal layout. Selectable: none, pointer-events: none.
layout_and_spacing.email_status: Small, live operational indicator (pulsing dot + text 'Flusso Email Live') positioned in the top right or navbar, enhancing reliability.

navbar.logo: Clean, well-aligned icon only. REMOVE the word 'Herion'.
navbar.styling: Crystal Glassmorphism (bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/40) or crisp solid white with 1px subtle border.

cards.style: Neumorphic tactile edge: white background, subtle ambient shadow (shadow-sm), 1px border (border-slate-100). Hover state: slight lift, shadow-md.
cards.hierarchy: Macro-sections must feel distinct. Use different background tints (e.g., surface_alt for secondary cards) or varying border weights.

buttons.primary: bg-[#0A192F] text-white hover:bg-[#112240] transition-colors rounded-md px-6 py-2 font-semibold

icons.usage: Use stroke-width 1.5 for a premium, delicate feel. Avoid heavy icons.

testing.attributes: ALL interactive elements must have data-testid in kebab-case.

image_urls.description: Abstract architectural shapes with sky visible (can be used for accent banners or login background)

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a premium LIGHT theme using Manrope font.

For the massive background typography 'herion-logo', use absolute positioning, very large font size (e.g. text-[20vw] or huge SVG), tracking-widest, text-slate-100/50, pointer-events-none, fixed to the background. Make it look architectural/pyramidal.
In the Navbar, DO NOT render the text 'Herion'. Only render the SVG/Lucide logo. Follow the exact primary and dropdown links provided.
Add a small 'Email Live' operational status indicator in the top right. Use a pulsing green or electric blue dot with 'Comunicazioni Attive'.
KPI Cards must not be all identical. Make the primary KPI (e.g. Total Practices) visually distinct (e.g., Deep Petrol background with white text), and the others white with subtle borders.
